use_codes.desc: AS AN ADJUNCT TO DIET TO REDUCE LOW-DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS AGED 10 YEARS AND OLDER WITH HETEROZYGOUS FAMILIAL HYPERCHOLESTEROLEMIA

AS AN ADJUNCT TO OTHER LOW-DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL (LDL-C) LOWERING THERAPIES, OR ALONE IF SUCH TREATMENTS ARE UNAVAILABLE, TO REDUCE LDL-C IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS AGED 10 YEARS AND OLDER WITH HOMOZYGOUS FAMILIAL HYPERCHOLESTEROLEMIA
METHOD FOR LOWERING CHOLESTEROL LEVEL IN A HUMAN
